modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: File is locked for editing in Excel or Word.

full_description_text: The user was trying to open a document but got an error message. It says the file is locked for editing by another user. They can only open it in read-only mode or get notified when it's available. This is causing issues since they can't make any changes.
short_description: File is locked for editing in Excel or Word.
description: The user was trying to open a document but got an error message. It says the file is locked for editing by another user. They can only open it in read-only mode or get notified when it's available. This is causing issues since they can't make any changes.
